ftx_id.label: FlowTraceX ID
ftx_id.description: System-generated UUID for every event (log-source agnostic)

src_ip_is_private.label: Src Private
src_ip_is_private.description: Source IP is RFC1918 private address

dst_ip_is_private.label: Dst Private
dst_ip_is_private.description: Dest IP is RFC1918 private address

conn_state.label: State
conn_state.description: TCP state code (SF=normal, S0=no reply, REJ=rejected)

history.label: History
history.description: State history letters (S=SYN, A=ACK, F=FIN, R=RST)

orig_ip_bytes.label: Sent IP Bytes
orig_ip_bytes.description: IP-level bytes including headers from originator

resp_ip_bytes.label: Recv IP Bytes
resp_ip_bytes.description: IP-level bytes including headers from responder

missed_bytes.label: Missed Bytes
missed_bytes.description: Bytes missed due to packet loss

local_orig.label: Local Src
local_orig.description: Whether source is a local address

local_resp.label: Local Dst
local_resp.description: Whether destination is a local address

rejected.label: Rejected
rejected.description: Whether the DNS query was rejected

host.label: Host
host.description: Target hostname from HTTP Host header

referrer.label: Referrer
referrer.description: URL that linked to this request

request_body_len.label: Req Size
request_body_len.description: Bytes in the HTTP request body

response_body_len.label: Resp Size
response_body_len.description: Bytes in the HTTP response body

curve.label: EC Curve
curve.description: Elliptic curve used in key exchange

cert_chain_fuids.label: Cert Chain UIDs
cert_chain_fuids.description: File UIDs for server certificate chain

client_cert_chain_fuids.label: Client Cert UIDs
client_cert_chain_fuids.description: File UIDs for client certificate chain

arg.label: Argument
arg.description: Argument passed with the FTP command

file_size.label: File Size
file_size.description: Size of the transferred file in bytes

mime_type.label: MIME Type
mime_type.description: Detected MIME type of transferred file

data_channel.passive.label: Passive Mode
data_channel.passive.description: Whether passive data channel was used

data_channel.orig_h.label: Data Src IP
data_channel.orig_h.description: Originator IP of the data channel

data_channel.resp_h.label: Data Dst IP
data_channel.resp_h.description: Responder IP of the data channel

data_channel.resp_p.label: Data Dst Port
data_channel.resp_p.description: Responder port of the data channel

fuid.label: File UID
fuid.description: Zeek file UID for the transferred file

from.label: From
from.description: Sender email address from message header

in_reply_to.label: In Reply To
in_reply_to.description: Message ID this email replies to

is_webmail.label: Webmail
is_webmail.description: Whether session appears to be webmail

assigned_addr.label: Assigned IP
assigned_addr.description: IP address assigned by DHCP server

msg_types.label: Msg Types
msg_types.description: DHCP message types in session (DISCOVER, OFFER, REQUEST, ACK...)

domain.label: Domain
domain.description: Domain name provided by DHCP server

client_fqdn.label: Client FQDN
client_fqdn.description: Fully qualified domain name from client

uids.label: Conn UIDs
uids.description: Connection UIDs associated with this lease

cert_type.label: Cert Type
cert_type.description: Type of certificate used in RDP session

requested_color_depth.label: Color Depth
requested_color_depth.description: Requested color depth for the session

size.label: File Size
size.description: Size of the file in bytes

fuid.label: File UID
fuid.description: Zeek file UID for this file

path.label: Share Path
path.description: UNC path of the mapped SMB share

native_file_system.label: Filesystem
native_file_system.description: Native filesystem of the share (NTFS, FAT...)

named_pipe.label: Named Pipe
named_pipe.description: Named pipe used for RPC transport

rtt.label: RTT
rtt.description: Round-trip time for the RPC call

set_requests.label: SET Reqs
set_requests.description: Number of SNMP SET requests (write ops)

up_since.label: Up Since
up_since.description: Timestamp when the device was last rebooted

framed_addr.label: Framed IP
framed_addr.description: IP address assigned to client after auth

connect_info.label: Connect Info
connect_info.description: Connection speed or access point info

mime_type.label: MIME Type
mime_type.description: MIME type of the transferred file

filename.label: Filename
filename.description: Name of the transferred file (if available)

source.label: Source
source.description: Zeek analyzer that identified the file (HTTP, FTP, SMB...)

fuid.label: File UID
fuid.description: Unique file identifier assigned by Zeek

tx_hosts.label: Sender IPs
tx_hosts.description: IP addresses that sent (originated) the file

rx_hosts.label: Receiver IPs
rx_hosts.description: IP addresses that received the file

conn_uids.label: Conn UIDs
conn_uids.description: Connection UIDs associated with the file transfer

depth.label: Depth
depth.description: Nesting depth of the file (e.g. archive within archive)

analyzers.label: Analyzers
analyzers.description: Zeek analyzers applied to the file

is_orig.label: From Orig
is_orig.description: Whether the file came from the originator

missing_bytes.label: Missing Bytes
missing_bytes.description: Bytes missing due to packet loss

timedout.label: Timed Out
timedout.description: Whether the file analysis timed out

parent_fuid.label: Parent File UID
parent_fuid.description: UID of the parent file (for extracted/nested files)

extracted.label: Extracted Path
extracted.description: Local path where extracted file was saved

extracted_cutoff.label: Extraction Cut
extracted_cutoff.description: Whether file extraction was cut short

extracted_size.label: Extracted Size
extracted_size.description: Size of the extracted file in bytes

name.label: Weird Name
name.description: Name/type of the protocol anomaly detected

notice.label: Notice
notice.description: Whether this weird triggered a Zeek notice

peer.label: Peer
peer.description: Peer that generated this weird (for cluster setups)

source.label: Source
source.description: Source of the weird (protocol analyzer name)

analyzer.label: Analyzer
analyzer.description: Zeek protocol analyzer that detected the mismatch

sub.label: Sub-Message
sub.description: Additional context or sub-message for the notice

src.label: Notice Src
src.description: Source address associated with the notice

dst.label: Notice Dst
dst.description: Destination address associated with the notice

fuid.label: File UID
fuid.description: File UID associated with the notice

p.label: Port
p.description: Port number associated with the notice

n.label: Count
n.description: Numeric value associated with the notice

peer_descr.label: Peer Desc
peer_descr.description: Description of the peer that raised the notice

suppress_for.label: Suppress Duration
suppress_for.description: How long to suppress duplicate notices (seconds)
